overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city environment (Cyberpunk 2077), descending from a rooftop plaza to street level and walking through covered commercial arcades, crossing an intersection with elevated highways, and approaching an underpass. The scene features neon signage, steam vents, and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a white concrete rooftop platform with a palm tree visible. The camera descends a wide concrete staircase toward street level, passing a pedestrian coming up the stairs. Modern apartment buildings with balconies surround the area.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial walkway with a metal roof overhead. The path features neon storefront signs on the left and a green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street on the right. Digital advertisement kiosks display animated content as pedestrians walk ahead.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection dominated by elevated highway ramps and monorail tracks overhead. The camera crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing steam vents releasing white smoke. A blue 'Ellison' street sign is visible as futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection.

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open concrete plaza with modern benches where people are sitting. The area features green dumpsters and orange structural arches supporting the elevated highway above. The camera approaches a large concrete underpass entrance with curved ramps, passing buildings with graffiti on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a clean, elevated rooftop plaza down into the dense, neon-lit infrastructure of a futuristic city. It begins on a white concrete platform beside a palm tree, moving down a wide staircase past modern apartment balconies toward the street level. As the camera reaches the ground, the scene shifts into a covered commercial walkway where neon storefronts and animated digital kiosks line the path beneath a metal roof. The perspective then emerges from the shelter into a wide open intersection, crossing a street filled with steam vents and futuristic vehicles under a canopy of elevated highway ramps and monorail tracks. Finally, the camera moves through a concrete plaza with orange structural arches and graffiti-covered walls before approaching the dark entrance of a large concrete underpass.
